data.title: b2wise partners with Sundance Growth to bring DDMRP and AI-driven planning to N. America, accelerating global growth.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, b2wise, a prominent company specializing in DDMRP and AI-driven supply chain planning solutions, revealed a significant partnership with Sundance Growth, a growth-equity firm from MENLO PARK, California. This collaboration marks a crucial step for both entities as they aim to enhance their presence in the B2B software sector. The partnership between the two companies is expected to bring about innovative strategies and technologies to the market.

data.title: High costs of vet care impacting access, new study shows. 94% of vets note financial strain on clients, 56% say sometimes, 38% say often.
data.description: A recent study conducted by PetSmart Charities in collaboration with Gallup uncovered discrepancies between veterinarians and pet owners regarding flexible care options in light of financial constraints. The study, which was conducted in Washington and released on January 20, 2026, found that 94% of veterinarians believe that clients' financial concerns impact their decisions. Specifically, 56% of veterinarians mentioned that financial considerations sometimes influence pet care choices, while 38% stated that this happens frequently. These findings highlight the need for improved communication and understanding between pet owners and veterinarians as they navigate shared financial challenges.

data.title: Disclosure Facts received certification from the Validation Institute for its advertising risk infrastructure for consumer brands.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Disclosure Facts, a company specializing in advertising risk infrastructure for consumer brands looking to expand creator and influencer advertising, revealed its latest achievement. The company has officially obtained independent certification from the Validation Institute. This certification serves as validation of their expertise and credibility in the field. The certification showcases Disclosure Facts' commitment to ensuring transparency and reliability, reinforcing trust with clients. This milestone highlights the company's dedication to upholding industry standards.

data.title: Chicago attorney Furqan Mohammad honored as Super Lawyers Rising Star for 10th consecutive year, from 2016 to 2025.
data.description: Located in Elmwood Park, Illinois, on January 20, 2026, Furqan Mohammad has been honored as a Super Lawyers Rising Star for an impressive ten years straight, from 2016 to 2025. This recognition underscores his commitment to legal advocacy in the state, showcasing his consistent excellence in the field.

data.title: City of Newark named Digital Inclusion Trailblazer for 3rd year in a row by NDIA, efforts to close the digital divide recognized.
data.description: For three consecutive years, the City of Newark in New Jersey has been acknowledged by the National Digital Inclusion Alliance (NDIA) as a Digital Inclusion Trailblazer for the year 2025. This recognition highlights Newark's dedication to bridging the digital divide by providing greater access to technology and digital resources. This prestigious accolade solidifies Newark's position as a leader in promoting digital equity and inclusion within the community.

data.title: Publix Fort Lauderdale A1A Marathon & Half Marathon on Feb 15, 2026, in its 21st year, drawing thousands.
data.description: The 21st annual Publix Fort Lauderdale A1A Marathon & Half Marathon Presented by Colavita is set to take place on Sunday, February 15th in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. As one of South Florida's top running events, the race is expected to attract thousands of participants.

data.title: Air Canada named a top employer for young people in 2026 for the third year, offering diverse HR initiatives.
data.description: Air Canada has implemented various progressive human resources programs, such as providing language training and introducing a buddy system to support the integration of young professionals into the company. Additionally, they organize engagement events throughout the year to foster ongoing interaction among employees. These initiatives reflect the airline's commitment to enhancing its workforce and promoting a positive work environment.

data.title: D.R. Horton reports lower earnings and revenue but beats expectations with $594.8M net income and $6.887B revenue for Q1 2026 amid affordability challenges.
data.description: D.R. Horton, Inc. reported its fiscal 2026 first-quarter results, with lower year-over-year earnings and revenue, but exceeding analyst expectations. The company's net income was $594.8 million, or $2.03 per diluted share, compared to $844.9 million, or $2.61 per diluted share, in the prior year. Revenue was $6.887 billion, down from $7.613 billion. Consolidated pre-tax income was $798.1 million, with a profit margin of 11.6%. D.R. Horton is America's largest homebuilder by volume since 2002, based in Arlington, Texas. Sales surpassed expectations, exceeding the $6.603 billion consensus estimate. The company navigated affordability pressures and cautious consumer sentiment while returning significant capital to shareholders.

data.title: Citizens Financial Group (NYSE: CFG) to announce earnings on 2026-01-21. Analysts estimate EPS of $1.11. Positive guidance expected.
data.description: Citizens Financial Group (NYSE: CFG) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on Wednesday, January 21, 2026. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.11 for the company. Investors will be looking for signs that Citizens Financial Group has exceeded this estimate and are also eager for positive guidance on future growth. For more details, interested readers can find the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Treble PR sees record revenue in 2025, 20% YoY increase, driven by Enterprise Tech and Cybersecurity groups.
data.description: In Austin, Texas and San Francisco, Treble, a leading B2B technology public relations agency, revealed its record revenue for 2025 with a 20% year-over-year rise. The growth was propelled by expanding its Enterprise Technology and Cybersecurity Practice Groups. Treble was chosen as the U.S. agency of record for KnowBe4, a prominent player in the fast-growing human risk management market segment. The success in 2025 showcases a noticeable shift in the market landscape.

data.title: NHS Management cuts hiring time by 66%, generates $2.2M revenue with UKG Rapid Hire in Lowell, Mass.
data.description: NHS Management in Lowell, Mass. has implemented UKG Rapid Hire to speed up their hiring process, resulting in increased revenue and improved candidate experience. This move has allowed the company to swiftly fill positions as they work to reopen care facilities.

data.title: National house prices remained stable in 2025 per First American Data & Analytics, released December 2025 Home Price Index.
data.description: First American Data & Analytics, a division of First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), headquartered in Santa Ana, California, unveiled its December 2025 Home Price Index (HPI) report. This report, which provides property-centric data, risk management, and valuation solutions, offers insights into home price fluctuations on a national, state, and metropolitan level, including Core-Based Statistical Areas. The HPI report tracks changes in home prices in various metropolitan price tiers, operating on a less than four-week lag behind real-time data.

data.title: Study by MediaScience for LG Ad Solutions finds Creative and Targeting crucial on Connected TV, shaping viewer's memory.
data.description: In Mountain View, California, LG Ad Solutions sponsored a study carried out by MediaScience to explore the effectiveness of advertising on Connected TV, which is reshaping content and brand discovery for consumers. The findings from the study titled "The Art & Science of the CTV-First Era: Part 2 – Consumer Experience" reveal a significant transformation in the creation and reception of television advertisements. Connected TV is uniting creative elements and targeting strategies on the primary screen in households, marking a notable shift in the advertising landscape.

data.title: Angle Health and Leap Health partner to improve infusion care for 3,000+ SMBs, focusing on cost savings and member experience.
data.description: In a joint press release today, Angle Health and Leap Health unveiled their partnership aimed at revolutionizing infusion care delivery. Angle Health, an innovator in AI-powered healthcare benefits, has joined forces with Leap Health, a leading specialty healthcare platform, to offer a seamless and cost-effective solution. This collaboration will provide Angle Health's extensive network of over 3,000 small and medium-sized business employers with improved access to infusion care services. The initiative focuses on delivering care in more convenient and comfortable settings, such as homes, thereby reducing the need for traditional clinical visits.

data.title: Simpro Group appoints Raffi Tchakmakjian as Chief Product & Business Development Officer, aiming to accelerate innovation.
data.description: Simpro Group, a renowned leader in AI-driven operating software for trades worldwide, has recently appointed Raffi Tchakmakjian as the Chief Product & Business Development Officer. In this new role, Tchakmakjian is tasked with spearheading product strategy, advancing the AI-driven platform evolution, and driving business and corporate development initiatives. With the objective of accelerating innovation and enhancing customer value delivery, Tchakmakjian will concentrate on these key areas to expand and grow the company's offerings.

data.title: Accel Solutions (TASE: ACCL) boosts cyber operations with integration of BBT.live, focusing on secure connectivity & network security.
data.description: Accel Solutions Ltd., listed on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange as ACCL, a leading cybersecurity and technology group in Israel, shared news of a significant strategic development. The company has expanded its cyber operations by fully incorporating BBT.live into its group. This move enhances Accel's presence in secure connectivity and network security, particularly in SD-WAN, Secure Access Service Edge (SASE), and Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA). This integration marks a milestone for Accel and emphasizes its commitment to growth in the cybersecurity sector.

data.title: Atento and Omilia partner for AI innovations in CX, focusing on conversational experiences. Strategic pillars include AI Advance Insights, Agent Assist, and Agent.
data.description: In Athens, Greece, leading companies Omilia and Atento have formed a strategic alliance to provide enhanced conversational experiences on a large scale. Omilia, known as a top player in Self-Learning Agentic CX, has teamed up with Atento, a global provider of customer experience management and business transformation outsourcing services. The collaboration aims to bolster Atento's offerings with a focus on three key areas: AI Advance Insights, AI Agent Assist, and AI Agent. This partnership is set to revolutionize the customer experience sector with its innovative approach.

data.title: Deeto announces platform revamp to convert customer feedback into actionable insights for real-time use by organizations.
data.description: Deeto, an AI-native platform specializing in customer intelligence and activation, revealed a significant update for its platform in New York today. The upgrade focuses on leveraging authentic customer feedback as a primary source of information for businesses. Through this transformation, Deeto's platform consolidates customer conversations, feedback, and sentiment into a unified operational layer accessible in real-time. This new approach replaces the reliance on disjointed insights and delayed reports, enabling organizations to consistently capture and utilize customer data efficiently.

data.title: ASGN Inc. to acquire Quinnox for $290 million in cash, renaming as Everforth. #ITservices #digitalSolutions
data.description: ASGN Incorporated, soon to be known as Everforth, a prominent IT services and professional solutions provider serving commercial and government sectors, revealed its plan to acquire Quinnox Inc. for $290 million in cash. Quinnox, a dynamic digital solutions provider, has agreed to the deal, which is pending the completion of standard closing procedures. Upon successful finalization, ASGN's acquisition of Quinnox will further bolster its position in the industry.
